Runtime actions demo — three Adapt buttons at runtime.

Use the action list pickers (same as palette Button → Edit actions) to add rxOpenViewAction, rxLaunchProcessAction, and other platform rx-actions with full parameters.

  • Open view button (actions) — chain runs on first button; if empty, legacy view name fields apply.
  • Launch process button (actions) — chain runs on second button; if empty, legacy process name + message apply.
  • Notification button (actions) — optional chain on third button; if empty, built-in notification demo runs.

See Legacy sections only when you are not using action chains.
